# Wizard Pipe

> [!abstract] ⚪ Attachment · Cost: **1** · Neutral

![[142009.png]]

*Item. Pipe.*

---

Attach to an **_Istari_** character. Limit 1 per character.
**Action:** Exhaust Wizard Pipe to exchange a card in your hand with the top card of your deck.
